Issues: Lack of unique commercial appeal: The style is highly simplistic and derivative, which limits its broad marketability.
Low technical complexity: The drawing relies on basic shapes and flat colors, which may not attract buyers seeking highly detailed or complex illustrations.
Uniqueness concerns: The aesthetic is very common in digital art and requires a strong niche to sell effectively.
No inherent IP risk: As an original creation (assumed), there are no direct legal violations, but the lack of unique style makes it harder to stand out commercially.
